title: Realtime Co-Agent TypeConfiguration
description: Configuration payload for agents of the Realtime type — the agent's realtime profile. Effective config = AIAgentType.DefaultConfiguration <- AIAgent.TypeConfiguration <- runtime overrides (later layers win per key, deep-merged).

modelPreference.description: Preferred realtime AI model (name or ID). Used unless an authorized runtime override supplies a different model.

tone.description: Spoken tone folded into the session system prompt (e.g. 'warm, unhurried').

speakingStyle.description: Speaking style folded into the session system prompt (e.g. 'concise, plain language').

providers.description: Per-provider voice settings, keyed by provider key (openai, gemini, elevenlabs, assemblyai).

voiceId.description: Provider voice identifier where voices are ID-addressed (e.g. ElevenLabs).

allowUserModelOverride.description: When false, even authorized users cannot override the model at runtime for sessions fronted by this agent.

paceMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between spoken progress narrations while delegated work runs.
